name: assetmason-resource-plan
description: Deterministic public contracts, scanners, validators, fixtures, and renderers for AssetMason Agent Resource Planning.

scripts.build: node ../../node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --target ES2022 --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --resolveJsonModule --declaration --outDir dist --rootDir src src/index.ts
